name: Stand Side Bend
instruction: Stand tall, place one hand on your hip, and bend sideways slowly. Alternate sides with steady breathing.
motivation: Loosen your spine and wake up your core after sitting.

name: Chair Squat
instruction: Stand in front of your chair, lower down until you almost sit, then rise back up with control.
motivation: Activate your legs and improve circulation.

name: Neck Stretch
instruction: Gently tilt your head to each side and hold briefly without forcing the stretch.
motivation: Release built-up tension from long screen sessions.

name: Shoulder Rolls
instruction: Roll your shoulders forward and backward in a smooth circular motion.
motivation: Open your upper body and reduce stiffness.

name: Hand Stretch
instruction: Extend one arm forward, gently pull the fingers back, then switch hands.
motivation: Give your wrists and hands a quick reset.

name: Knee Raise Right
instruction: Stand upright, raise your right knee toward your chest, lower, and repeat with control.
motivation: Engage your hips and improve balance.

name: Back Twist
instruction: Sit or stand tall, rotate your torso gently to each side while keeping your hips stable.
motivation: Refresh your lower back and posture.

name: Calf Raise
instruction: Lift your heels, pause at the top, and slowly lower back down.
motivation: Boost lower-leg circulation during the workday.

name: Seated Leg Extension
instruction: While seated, extend one leg fully, hold briefly, lower, and switch sides.
motivation: Wake up your legs without leaving your desk.

name: Upper Back Stretch
instruction: Clasp your hands in front, round the upper back slightly, and breathe into the stretch.
motivation: Counter rounded shoulders and desk posture.

name: Ankle Circles
instruction: Lift one foot and make slow circles with your ankle, then switch sides.
motivation: Improve ankle mobility and reduce stiffness.

name: Torso Side Twist
instruction: Stand with feet grounded and rotate your torso side to side in a relaxed rhythm.

name: Seated Marching
instruction: Sit tall and lift your knees one by one as if marching in place.
motivation: Get your blood flowing even in a short break.

name: Wrist Rotations
instruction: Extend your hands forward and rotate your wrists both directions slowly.
motivation: Ease wrist tension from keyboard and mouse use.

name: Forward Fold
instruction: Stand tall, hinge at the hips, and fold forward comfortably while relaxing your neck.
motivation: Lengthen your back body and calm your mind.

name: Arm Circles
instruction: Extend your arms sideways and draw controlled circles forward and backward.
motivation: Warm up your shoulders and upper arms.

name: Shoulder Shrugs
instruction: Lift your shoulders toward your ears, hold briefly, then release fully.
motivation: Let go of tension and reset your posture.

name: Glute Squeeze
instruction: While sitting or standing, squeeze your glutes, hold briefly, then relax.
motivation: Activate muscles that get lazy during long sitting sessions.
